title: Simple Clubs
description: A simple little mod about adding Clubs!
body:
This mod adds Clubs, a primitive but strong early game weapon with slow cooldown.

 

Be free to use in modpacks, you don't have to give credit.

 

 

Question: Will you port to X Version?  Answer: Hopefully  (Feel free to suggest versions)

Question: Will you add more content?  Answer: Only in Seperate Mods



 

Part of the Simple Mod Series


Mod was Made with MCreator

 

Download Goals
